name: Deepak Menon
bio: Author exploring the intersection of strategy and storytelling.

name: James Okoro
bio: James writes about how independent creators build careers from tiny daily habits.

name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Sarah writes quiet, devastating literary fiction about second chances.

name: Priya Sharma
bio: Priya builds worlds with dragons, oaths, and unforgivable choices.

name: Alex Chen
bio: Alex helps remote workers and digital nomads make sense of money across currencies and tax regimes.

name: Anika Agarwal
bio: Anika Agarwal is the winner of the 21st Century Emily Dickinson Award. Her poetry explores the emotional roller coaster of navigating life, friendships, and self-discovery.

name: David Park
bio: David writes both practical playbooks and sweeping sci-fi about the futures we build.

name: Ananya Desai
bio: Ananya writes poems about distance and protocols for getting your body back.

name: Kevin Tran
bio: Kevin writes detective novels with mathematical puzzles at their heart.

name: Rohit Menon
bio: Rohit profiles introverted founders building outsized businesses.
